calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Production From Rocket Lawyer And To Compel Attendance Of The Person Most Knowledgeable From Rocket Lawyer At A Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Alexander Jones for Petitioner, Debra Dreas.
Julia Levitskaia for Respondent.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. Counsel stated parties have worked out submitted a stipulation and proposed order for the court's review. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DEBRA DREAS' Motion To Compel Further Production From Rocket Lawyer And To Compel Attendance Of The Person Most Knowledgeable From Rocket Lawyer At A Deposition: Counsel to send a copy of the stipulation and order re: subpoenas served on RocketLawyer Incorporated to JPT via email for review.

Judge Pro Tem: Adrienne Rogers, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

***Stipulation and order re: subpoenas served on RocketLawyer Incorporated signed after hearing.***

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Production From Rocket Lawyer And To Compel Attendance Of The Person Most Knowledgeable From Rocket Lawyer At A Deposition
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Nov-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Production From Rocket Lawyer And To Compel Attendance Of The Person Most Knowledgeable From Rocket Lawyer At A Deposition
